name: windy-plugin-weather-fronts
description: Windy plugin that shows weather fronts and pressure centers from KNMI, NOAA WPC and Met Office data

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && SERVE=false rollup -c && cp package.json dist/
scripts.build:win: rmdir /s /q dist && mkdir dist && set SERVE=false && rollup -c && copy package.json dist\
scripts.build:all-examples: for number in 01 02 03 04 05 06; do CONFIG=example$number SERVE=false rollup -c; done

author: Andreas Furster
